meta.description: A horizontal progress bar with label, value, and percentage display.

label.description: A short label describing the progress

dataSource.description: The exact name of the registered data source to fetch progress data from. Must return { value: number, maxValue: number } or { value: number } where maxValue defaults to 100.

dataSourceParams.description: Optional parameters to pass to the data source (e.g., { projectId: 'abc' })
